title: Minimal room reset
summary: Three quick changes: fewer visible items, one color base and one clean surface.
steps: Remove 10 items you do not use daily from sight.
Keep 2–3 dominant colors in the room.
Clear desk, table or dresser as the calm main zone.
warnings: Do not throw things away too quickly — make a decision box first.
dontDo: do not buy decor before decluttering

title: Minimal makeover — full plan
summary: No-renovation plan: order, zones and a simple visual base.
steps: Take a before photo to judge the effect.
Remove all items without a fixed place from floor and surfaces.
Split room into 3 zones: sleep/rest, work/study, storage.
Keep only one visible decoration on each bigger surface.
Group items by function: books, electronics, textiles.
Shopping list: 2 boxes, cable organizer, one neutral throw or poster.
warnings: Minimalism should make the room easier, not empty and uncomfortable.
dontDo: do not hide everything randomly in a wardrobe
do not start with shopping

title: Cozy room without renovation
summary: Add soft light, textiles and one warm accent.
steps: Move a lamp so it does not shine straight into eyes.
Add blanket, cushion or soft throw.
Place one decoration that warms the room.
dontDo: do not add many small items at once

title: Cozy makeover — full plan
summary: Warm up the room with light, textiles and layout.
steps: Start by clearing the floor and the area near bed or sofa.
Set side light: lamp on dresser, desk or shelf.
Add one soft element: blanket, throw, rug or cushion.
Choose one warm accent color: beige, rust, olive, honey or muted pink.
Hide cables and packaging because they reduce coziness.
DIY list: LED candle, personal poster in frame, shelf styled with 3–5 items.
warnings: Do not place real candles close to textiles or paper.
dontDo: do not block passage
do not cover ventilation or radiator

title: Colorful room refresh
summary: Quick makeover with one strong color and ordered accessories.
steps: Pick one accent color.
Group accessories in that color in one area.
Keep the rest of the background calmer.
warnings: Too many colors at once can look chaotic.
dontDo: do not mix all colors without a plan

title: Colorful room — full plan
summary: Refresh the room without painting walls.
steps: Choose base: white, gray, wood or beige.
Add one accent color and repeat it in 3 spots.
Easy color points: cushion, poster, box, lamp, desk mat.
Remove accessories that do not match the palette.
Group colorful things instead of scattering them everywhere.
Budget variant: printed poster, paper-covered box, books arranged by color.
warnings: Color should guide the eye, not shout from every corner.
dontDo: do not buy many cheap decorations at once
do not leave random packaging as decoration

title: Gaming zone without renovation
summary: Organized gaming zone: cables, light and accessory place.
steps: Route cables along one path.
Put accessories in one place.
Add one side light instead of many random LEDs.
warnings: Gaming zone must still be comfortable to sit in and clean.
dontDo: do not cover device ventilation

title: Gaming makeover — full plan
summary: Gaming zone plan without renovation and large purchases.
steps: Remove from desk items unrelated to gaming, study or work.
Route cables along one side and tie them.
Put headphones, controller and chargers in one area.
Add side or monitor-back light without glare.
Choose one color theme for accessories, e.g. blue, violet or orange.
Shopping list: cable ties, headphone holder, mat, small accessory box.
warnings: Do not block ventilation of PC, console or power supply.
dontDo: do not place drinks near power strip
do not overload extension cord

title: Study and work zone
summary: Quick desk and focus area reset.
steps: Keep only today's needed items on desk.
Move distractions out of hand reach.
Add one place for notes and charger.
warnings: Desk does not have to be empty, but it must be readable.
dontDo: do not keep cables and papers in one tangle

title: Study/work room — full plan
steps: Place most-used things within easy reach.
Create three desk zones: device/notebook, writing, drop zone.
Move decorations from desktop to shelf or wall.
Set lamp on the opposite side of writing hand to reduce shadow.
Add a box for random desk items.
Shopping list: organizer, lamp, document tray, cable holder.
warnings: Do not improve looks at the cost of seating comfort and good light.
dontDo: do not set monitor too low
do not work in dim light all the time

title: Small room — more space
summary: Three changes to visually and practically lighten a small room.
steps: Remove things from the floor.
Use boxes vertically: shelf, wardrobe, under bed.
Leave one bright empty wall or surface area.
warnings: In a small room every item without a place creates chaos quickly.
dontDo: do not add big furniture without measuring

title: Small room — full plan
summary: Small-room makeover through storage and light.
steps: Measure passages: keep a clear route from door to bed/desk.
Remove bags, boxes and loose items from the floor.
Move seasonal items to under-bed boxes or top wardrobe shelf.
Use vertical space: hooks, shelf, door organizer.
Choose a light base and one accent so the room does not feel heavy.
Shopping list: under-bed box, 2 hooks, hanging organizer, small lamp.
warnings: Do not cover window, block door or radiator.
dontDo: do not buy shelving before measuring
do not block passage

title: 0-budget makeover
summary: Start with layout, selection and what you already own.
steps: Move 5 items to better places.
Create one empty surface.
Arrange textiles and books by color or function.
warnings: 0-budget works if you really start with order.
dontDo: do not buy anything before checking what you already have

title: 0-budget plan
steps: Take a room photo and pick three most chaotic spots.
For 20 minutes remove things from surfaces and floor.
Move one small item: lamp, chair, table or bin.
Make decor from what you have: books, poster, plant, paper-covered box.
Swap items so colors work better together.
After one hour compare before and after photo.
warnings: Do not start with heavy rearranging if time is short.
dontDo: do not throw clutter loosely into wardrobe
do not move heavy furniture alone

title: Quick room plan
summary: Universal 3 changes: order, light and one accent.
steps: Clear one visible surface.
Improve light near bed, desk or sofa.
Add one consistent color accent.
warnings: The biggest effect usually comes from order, not buying decor.
dontDo: do not start from expensive shopping

title: Universal makeover plan
steps: Name the main problem: clutter, dark, boring, no storage or bad desk.
Create one empty surface as visual center of order.
Set lighting so the room feels calmer in the evening.
Pick one palette: neutral, warm, colorful, gaming or study/work.
Add up to three new or found accents.
After changes list 3 things still missing — shop only then.
warnings: The MVP does not analyze photos; the plan is based on form answers.
dontDo: do not renovate without a plan
do not buy big furniture without measuring
